question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping takes 2-3 business days.

question: Do you offer free shipping?
answer: Yes, we offer free shipping on orders over $50.

question: Can I change my shipping address?
answer: You can change your shipping address before the order is shipped by contacting customer support.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping takes 10-15 business days.

question: How do I track my shipment?
answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email to track your shipment.

question: What happens if my package is lost?
answer: If your package is lost, please contact our customer support team and we will investigate and reship or refund your order.

question: Can I schedule a delivery time?
answer: Currently we do not offer scheduled delivery times, but we are working on adding this feature.

question: Do you deliver on weekends?
answer: Yes, we deliver on Saturdays. Sunday deliveries are not available at this time.

question: What courier do you use?
answer: We use FedEx, UPS, and USPS depending on your location and the size of your order.

question: Can I pick up my order in store?
answer: Yes, in-store pickup is available at select locations. Choose the pickup option at checkout.

question: How do I return a damaged item?
answer: If you received a damaged item, please take photos and contact customer support within 48 hours for a free return and replacement.

question: What is your refund policy?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.

question: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it?
answer: Yes, you can exchange items within 30 days of purchase. Contact customer support to initiate an exchange.

question: How long do I have to return an item?
answer: You have 30 days from the date of delivery to return an item.

question: Do I have to pay for return shipping?
answer: Return shipping is free for defective or incorrect items. For other returns, a shipping fee may apply.

question: How will I receive my refund?
answer: Refunds are issued to the original payment method used during purchase.

question: Can I return a sale item?
answer: Sale items can be returned for store credit only, not cash refunds.

question: What items cannot be returned?
answer: Perishable goods, digital downloads, and personalized items cannot be returned.

question: How do I initiate a return?
answer: Log into your account, go to Order History, select the item, and click Return Item to start the process.

question: Can I return an item without a receipt?
answer: Yes, if you have your order number we can process the return without a physical receipt.

question: Do you accept PayPal?
answer: Yes, we accept PayPal as a payment method at checkout.

question: Can I pay with cryptocurrency?
answer: Currently we do not accept cryptocurrency payments.

question: Is my payment information secure?
answer: Yes, all payment information is encrypted using SSL technology and we never store your card details.

question: Can I pay in installments?
answer: Yes, we offer installment payment options through Klarna and Afterpay at checkout.

question: Why was my payment declined?
answer: Your payment may have been declined due to insufficient funds, incorrect card details, or bank restrictions. Please try another card or contact your bank.

question: Can I use multiple payment methods?
answer: Currently you can only use one payment method per order.

question: Do you accept gift cards?
answer: Yes, we accept our store gift cards as payment. Enter the gift card code at checkout.

question: Can I get an invoice for my order?
answer: Yes, invoices are automatically sent to your email after purchase. You can also download them from your account.

question: Do you charge sales tax?
answer: Sales tax is charged based on your shipping address and local tax laws.

question: Can I save my payment details for future purchases?
answer: Yes, you can securely save your payment details in your account settings for faster checkout.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, go to Account Settings and click Delete Account, or contact customer support.

question: How do I change my password?
answer: Go to Account Settings, click Change Password, enter your current password and then your new password.

question: I forgot my username, what should I do?
answer: Your username is typically your email address. Try logging in with your email or use the Forgot Username link.

question: Can I have multiple accounts?
answer: We allow only one account per person. Multiple accounts may be merged or suspended.

question: How do I update my email address?
answer: Go to Account Settings and update your email address. A verification email will be sent to confirm the change.

question: How do I update my phone number?
answer: Log into your account, go to Profile Settings, and update your phone number there.

question: Can I link my social media account?
answer: Yes, you can link your Google or Facebook account for easier login in Account Settings.

question: What do I do if my account is hacked?
answer: Immediately change your password and contact customer support. We will help secure your account.

question: How do I turn off email notifications?
answer: Go to Account Settings, then Notification Preferences, and turn off the notifications you do not want.

question: Can I have a business account?
answer: Yes, we offer business accounts with bulk pricing and invoicing. Contact our business team for more details.

question: How do I apply a discount code?
answer: Enter your discount code in the promo code field at checkout and click Apply to get your discount.

question: Why is my coupon not working?
answer: Your coupon may be expired, already used, or not applicable to the items in your cart. Check the terms and conditions of the coupon.

question: Can I use multiple coupons at once?
answer: Only one coupon code can be used per order unless otherwise stated.

question: How do I get a discount coupon?
answer: Subscribe to our newsletter or follow us on social media to receive exclusive discount codes.

question: Do you offer student discounts?
answer: Yes, we offer a 10% student discount. Verify your student status through our student verification portal.

question: Do you have a loyalty rewards program?
answer: Yes, our rewards program lets you earn points on every purchase which can be redeemed for discounts.

question: How do I redeem my reward points?
answer: At checkout, you will see an option to redeem your reward points. Select how many points you want to apply.

question: When do my reward points expire?
answer: Reward points expire after 12 months of account inactivity.

question: Do you offer birthday discounts?
answer: Yes, we send a special birthday discount to registered members. Make sure your birthday is saved in your profile.

question: Can I transfer my reward points to someone else?
answer: Reward points are non-transferable and can only be used by the account holder.

question: What warranty do your products come with?
answer: Most products come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Check the product page for specific warranty details.

question: How do I make a warranty claim?
answer: Contact customer support with your order number and a description of the issue to initiate a warranty claim.

question: Does the warranty cover accidental damage?
answer: Standard warranties do not cover accidental damage. You may purchase an extended protection plan for additional coverage.

question: Can I extend my product warranty?
answer: Yes, extended warranty plans are available for purchase on the product page or at checkout.

question: What does the warranty not cover?
answer: Warranties do not cover damage caused by misuse, unauthorized repairs, or normal wear and tear.

question: How long does a warranty claim take?
answer: Warranty claims are typically processed within 7-10 business days.

question: Do you offer a satisfaction guarantee?
answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you are not happy with your purchase, we will make it right.

question: What happens if my product stops working?
answer: Contact customer support immediately. If the product is under warranty, we will repair or replace it at no cost.

question: Is the warranty valid internationally?
answer: Warranty coverage may vary by country. Contact customer support to check if your warranty is valid in your region.

question: Who do I contact for warranty support?
answer: Contact our customer support team via email or live chat for all warranty related inquiries.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can contact customer support via live chat, email, or phone. Our support team is available 24/7.

question: What are your customer support hours?
answer: Our customer support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

question: How long does it take to get a response from support?
answer: Email responses are typically sent within 24 hours. Live chat responses are immediate.

question: Do you have a phone number I can call?
answer: Yes, you can reach our customer support team by phone at our toll-free number listed on the Contact Us page.

question: Can I chat with a real person?
answer: Yes, our live chat connects you with a real customer support agent, not a bot.

question: How do I file a complaint?
answer: You can file a complaint by contacting customer support or filling out the feedback form on our website.

question: Do you have a help center?
answer: Yes, our help center at help.ourstore.com contains articles and guides to answer common questions.

question: Can I get support in my language?
answer: We offer support in English, Spanish, French, and German. More languages are being added.

question: How do I give feedback about my experience?
answer: You can leave feedback through the post-purchase survey sent to your email or on our website feedback form.

question: What do I do if I have not received a response from support?
answer: If you have not received a response within 24 hours, please follow up by replying to your support ticket or contacting us again.

question: Is the product in stock?
answer: Product availability is shown on the product page. If it shows In Stock, it is available for purchase.

question: Can I be notified when a product is back in stock?
answer: Yes, click the Notify Me button on the product page and we will email you when it is back in stock.

question: How accurate are product images?
answer: We strive to display product images as accurately as possible, but colors may vary slightly due to screen settings.

question: Are product reviews verified?
answer: Yes, all product reviews on our website are from verified purchasers only.

question: Can I purchase a product in bulk?
answer: Yes, we offer bulk purchasing options. Contact our business team for bulk pricing.

question: Do products come with instructions?
answer: Most products include an instruction manual. You can also find digital manuals on the product page.

question: Can I request a product that is not listed?
answer: You can submit a product request through our website and we will consider adding it to our catalog.

question: Are your products eco-friendly?
answer: We are committed to sustainability and offer a growing range of eco-friendly products. Look for the green label on product pages.

question: Do you sell refurbished products?
answer: Yes, we sell certified refurbished products that are tested and come with a 90-day warranty.

question: Can I see a product before buying?
answer: We offer detailed product descriptions, images, and videos to help you make an informed decision before purchasing.

question: How do I place an order?
answer: Browse our catalog, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout to complete your order.

question: Can I modify my order after placing it?
answer: Orders can be modified within 1 hour of placement. Contact customer support immediately to make changes.

question: What happens if an item in my order is out of stock?
answer: If an item becomes out of stock after your order, we will notify you and offer a refund or alternative product.

question: Can I add items to an existing order?
answer: Unfortunately, items cannot be added to an existing order. You would need to place a new order.

question: How do I know my order was confirmed?
answer: You will receive an order confirmation email with your order details shortly after placing your order.

question: Can I reorder a previous purchase?
answer: Yes, go to your Order History and click Reorder to quickly place the same order again.

question: What do I do if I received the wrong item?
answer: Contact customer support immediately with your order number and a photo of the wrong item. We will send the correct item.

question: Can I gift wrap my order?
answer: Yes, we offer gift wrapping for a small additional fee. Select the gift wrap option at checkout.

question: Can I include a gift message with my order?
answer: Yes, you can add a personalized gift message during checkout at no extra cost.

question: How do I check my order status?
answer: Log into your account and go to Order History to check the current status of your orders.

question: Do you price match?
answer: Yes, we offer price matching for identical products sold by authorized retailers. Contact customer support with proof of the lower price.

question: How do I know if a sale is happening?
answer: Subscribe to our newsletter or check our website homepage for the latest sales and promotions.

question: Can I get a price adjustment if an item goes on sale after I buy it?
answer: Yes, we offer price adjustments within 7 days of purchase if the item goes on sale.

question: Do you offer flash sales?
answer: Yes, we run flash sales regularly. Sign up for our newsletter to get notified of upcoming flash sales.

question: How long do sales last?
answer: Sale durations vary. Check the sale page for the end date and time of each promotion.

question: Do you have a referral program?
answer: Yes, refer a friend and both of you will receive a discount on your next purchase.

question: How does the referral program work?
answer: Share your unique referral link with friends. When they make their first purchase, you both earn a reward.

question: Can I refer more than one person?
answer: Yes, there is no limit to how many people you can refer. You earn a reward for each successful referral.

question: How do I find my referral link?
answer: Log into your account and go to the Referral Program section to find your unique referral link.

question: When will I receive my referral reward?
answer: Your referral reward will be added to your account within 48 hours of your friend completing their first purchase.

question: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, our mobile app is available on iOS and Android. Download it for exclusive app-only deals.

question: Is the mobile app free?
answer: Yes, our mobile app is completely free to download and use.

question: Can I track my order on the app?
answer: Yes, you can track your orders, manage returns, and contact support directly from our mobile app.

question: Does the app save my payment information?
answer: Yes, you can securely save payment information in the app for faster checkout.

question: How do I update the app?
answer: Go to the App Store or Google Play Store and check for available updates for our app.

question: Do you have a physical store?
answer: Yes, we have physical store locations. Visit our Store Locator page to find the nearest store.

question: What are your store hours?
answer: Store hours vary by location. Visit our Store Locator page for the hours of your nearest store.

question: Can I return online purchases in store?
answer: Yes, you can return online purchases at any of our physical store locations.

question: Do you offer in-store exclusive products?
answer: Some products are available exclusively in-store. Visit us to explore our full in-store selection.

question: Can I check in-store product availability online?
answer: Yes, use our Store Inventory Checker on the product page to see if an item is available at your local store.

question: What is your privacy policy?
answer: We are committed to protecting your privacy. We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Read our full privacy policy on our website.

question: How do you use my personal data?
answer: We use your personal data to process orders, improve our services, and send relevant communications with your consent.

question: Can I request my personal data?
answer: Yes, you can request a copy of your personal data by contacting our privacy team at privacy@ourstore.com.

question: How do I opt out of marketing emails?
answer: Click the Unsubscribe link at the bottom of any marketing email or update your preferences in Account Settings.

question: Do you use cookies?
answer: Yes, we use cookies to improve your browsing experience. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

question: Is my personal information shared with third parties?
answer: We only share your information with trusted partners necessary to fulfill your order, such as shipping carriers.

question: How do I report a security vulnerability?
answer: If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it responsibly to security@ourstore.com.

question: Is your website secure?
answer: Yes, our website uses HTTPS encryption to protect all data transmitted between your browser and our servers.

question: Can I request deletion of my data?
answer: Yes, you can request deletion of your personal data by contacting our privacy team. Note this may deactivate your account.

question: Do you comply with GDPR?
answer: Yes, we are fully compliant with GDPR and other applicable data protection regulations.

question: How do I find the right size?
answer: Refer to our Size Guide on each product page for detailed measurements and sizing recommendations.

question: What if the size I want is not available?
answer: If your size is out of stock, click Notify Me and we will alert you when it becomes available.

question: Can I return an item if it does not fit?
answer: Yes, items that do not fit can be returned or exchanged within 30 days of purchase.

question: Do your sizes run small or large?
answer: Sizing varies by brand. Check the product reviews and size guide for specific recommendations.

question: Do you offer plus sizes?
answer: Yes, we offer an extended range of sizes including plus sizes. Use the size filter to find available options.

question: How do I care for my purchased product?
answer: Care instructions are included on the product label and on the product page under the Care Instructions section.

question: Are your products machine washable?
answer: Washing instructions vary by product. Check the care label or product page for specific washing instructions.

question: Can I personalize or customize a product?
answer: Yes, select products can be personalized with custom text or designs. Look for the Customize option on the product page.

question: How long does personalization take?
answer: Personalized orders take an additional 3-5 business days to process before shipping.

question: Can I cancel a personalized order?
answer: Personalized orders cannot be cancelled once production has begun. Contact support immediately if you need to make changes.

question: Do you offer gift wrapping for personalized items?
answer: Yes, gift wrapping is available for personalized items. Select this option at checkout.

question: What file formats do you accept for custom designs?
answer: We accept PNG, JPEG, and PDF file formats for custom design uploads.

question: Can I preview my customized product before ordering?
answer: Yes, our product customizer shows a preview of your personalized item before you add it to your cart.

question: How do I subscribe to your newsletter?
answer: Enter your email in the newsletter signup box at the bottom of our homepage and click Subscribe.

question: How do I unsubscribe from the newsletter?
answer: Click the Unsubscribe link at the bottom of any newsletter email to stop receiving them.

question: What are the benefits of subscribing to the newsletter?
answer: Newsletter subscribers get exclusive discounts, early access to sales, and new product announcements.

question: How often do you send newsletters?
answer: We send newsletters weekly. During sales seasons, we may send additional emails about special offers.

question: Can I choose what types of emails I receive?
answer: Yes, go to your Account Settings and select your email preferences to choose what communications you receive.

question: Do you have an affiliate program?
answer: Yes, our affiliate program lets you earn commissions by promoting our products. Apply on our Affiliate Program page.

question: How much commission do affiliates earn?
answer: Affiliates earn between 5% and 15% commission depending on the product category and sales volume.

question: How do I apply for the affiliate program?
answer: Visit our Affiliate Program page and fill out the application form. Applications are reviewed within 3 business days.

question: When do affiliates get paid?
answer: Affiliate commissions are paid monthly via PayPal or bank transfer once the minimum payout threshold is reached.

question: Can I promote your products on social media?
answer: Yes, as an affiliate you can promote our products on social media using your unique affiliate link.

question: What payment methods do you not accept?
answer: We do not accept cash, checks, or wire transfers for online orders.

question: Can I pay on delivery?
answer: Cash on delivery is available in select regions. Check if this option is available for your location at checkout.

question: Do you offer corporate purchasing?
answer: Yes, we offer corporate purchasing solutions with dedicated account managers. Contact our corporate sales team.

question: How do I get a bulk discount?
answer: Contact our sales team with details about the quantity you need and we will provide a custom bulk pricing quote.

question: Can I get a sample before buying in bulk?
answer: Yes, sample orders are available for bulk buyers. Contact our sales team to request samples.

question: What happens if I receive an incomplete order?
answer: If your order is incomplete, contact customer support with your order number and we will send the missing items.

question: Can I combine multiple orders into one shipment?
answer: Orders placed separately cannot be combined into one shipment. Plan your purchases to place everything in a single order.

question: Do you offer express delivery?
answer: Yes, express delivery is available at checkout for an additional fee. Delivery time is 1-2 business days.

question: What is the cutoff time for same-day dispatch?
answer: Orders placed before 12 PM on business days are dispatched the same day.

question: Do you offer subscription boxes?
answer: Yes, we offer monthly subscription boxes curated with our best products. Subscribe on our Subscription page.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: You can cancel your subscription anytime from your Account Settings under the Subscriptions section.

question: Can I pause my subscription?
answer: Yes, you can pause your subscription for up to 3 months from your Account Settings.

question: When will my subscription box be delivered?
answer: Subscription boxes are shipped on the 1st of each month and typically arrive within 5-7 business days.

question: Can I customize my subscription box?
answer: Yes, you can set product preferences for your subscription box in your account settings.

question: Do you have a waiting list for popular products?
answer: Yes, you can join the waiting list for popular out-of-stock products by clicking Notify Me on the product page.

question: How do I write a product review?
answer: After your purchase, you will receive an email inviting you to review your product. You can also review from your Order History.

question: Can I edit my product review?
answer: Yes, you can edit your review within 30 days of submitting it by going to your Account and finding the review.

question: Are there any restrictions on product reviews?
answer: Reviews must be honest, respectful, and related to the product. Offensive or fake reviews will be removed.

question: Do you reward customers for leaving reviews?
answer: Yes, you earn reward points for each verified review you submit on our website.

question: How do I report a fake review?
answer: Click the Report button next to the review to flag it. Our team will investigate and remove fake reviews.

question: What should I do if my order is delayed?
answer: If your order is delayed beyond the estimated delivery date, contact customer support with your tracking number for an update.

question: Can I get compensation for a delayed order?
answer: If your order is significantly delayed due to our error, we may offer a discount or store credit as compensation.

question: What is your policy on counterfeit products?
answer: We guarantee all products sold on our platform are authentic. Report any suspected counterfeit products to customer support.

question: Do you sell products from third-party sellers?
answer: Yes, some products are sold by third-party sellers on our marketplace. These are clearly labeled on the product page.

question: How do I contact a third-party seller?
answer: You can message a third-party seller through our platform by going to the product page and clicking Contact Seller.

question: Are third-party seller products covered by your return policy?
answer: Third-party seller returns are handled by the seller. Check the seller's return policy on their store page.

question: How do I become a seller on your platform?
answer: Apply to become a seller by visiting our Sell With Us page and completing the application form.

question: What are the fees for selling on your platform?
answer: Seller fees vary by category. Visit our Seller Center for detailed information on fees and commissions.

question: How do I report a problem with a seller?
answer: Contact customer support or use the Report Seller button on their store page to report any issues.

question: Do you verify sellers on your platform?
answer: Yes, all sellers go through a verification process before they can list products on our platform.

question: What currencies do you accept?
answer: We accept USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, and AUD. More currencies are being added regularly.

question: Can I change the currency displayed on the website?
answer: Yes, use the currency selector in the top right corner of the website to change your preferred currency.

question: Are prices inclusive of taxes?
answer: Prices shown do not include taxes. Applicable taxes are calculated and shown at checkout.

question: Do you offer duty-free shopping?
answer: Duty-free options may be available for international orders. Check the checkout page for applicable options.

question: How are customs fees handled for international orders?
answer: Customs fees and import duties are the responsibility of the customer and vary by country.

question: Can I donate to charity when making a purchase?
answer: Yes, at checkout you can choose to round up your total or add a donation to one of our partner charities.

question: Do you have a carbon offset program?
answer: Yes, we partner with environmental organizations to offset the carbon footprint of every shipment.

question: Are your packaging materials recyclable?
answer: Yes, we use recyclable and biodegradable packaging materials to minimize environmental impact.

question: Do you have sustainable product options?
answer: Yes, filter products by the Eco-Friendly tag to find our range of sustainable and environmentally responsible products.

question: How do I find out about new product launches?
answer: Follow us on social media and subscribe to our newsletter to be the first to know about new product launches.

question: Can I pre-order upcoming products?
answer: Yes, pre-orders are available for select upcoming products. Visit the product page and click Pre-Order to reserve yours.

question: When will my pre-order ship?
answer: Pre-order shipping dates are listed on the product page. You will be charged when the item ships.

question: Can I cancel a pre-order?
answer: Yes, pre-orders can be cancelled any time before the item ships by contacting customer support.

question: What happens if a pre-ordered product is discontinued?
answer: If a pre-ordered product is discontinued, you will be fully refunded and notified by email.

question: Do you offer product bundles?
answer: Yes, we offer product bundles at a discounted price. Look for the Bundle Deal tag on product pages.

question: Can I create my own product bundle?
answer: Yes, use our Build Your Own Bundle feature to select products and receive a bundle discount.

question: Are bundle items returnable individually?
answer: Bundle items must be returned as a complete set unless individual items were defective.

question: How do I find bundle deals?
answer: Visit our Deals page or filter by Bundle Deal in the product search to find all available bundle offers.

question: Do bundle deals have an expiry date?
answer: Some bundle deals are time-limited. Check the deal page for the expiry date of each bundle offer.
